basic_details.job_title: NIT Calicut Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Associate / Administrative Officer Posts
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Calicut (NIT Calicut) Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on the official website nitc.ac.in. A total of 3 vacancies for Research Associate and Administrative Officer posts have been announced through the NIT Calicut Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master of Planning with specialization in Urban Planning/Regional Planning/Housing/Environmental Planning/Transport Planning or Equivalent, Full Time MBA Degree with first class from a Reputed Institute
qualification.details: Research Associate: Master of Planning with specialization in Urban Planning/Regional Planning/Housing/Environmental Planning/Transport Planning or Equivalent. Desirable: PhD in relevant area. Proficiency in Soft Computing/GIS/MS Project/Data Analytics. Experience: 2 Years for Non-Ph.D. Administrative Officer: Full Time MBA Degree with first class from a Reputed Institute. Experience: 5 years experience in administrative duties in the private or public sector.

salary_details.details: Research Associate: Consolidated Salary Rs. 53,000/- per month Administrative Officer: Consolidated Salary Rs. 1,00,000/- per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIT Calicut Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Calicut to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.national_institute_of_technology_calicut: Master of Planning with specialization in Urban Planning/Regional Planning/Housing/Environmental Planning/Transport Planning or Equivalent, Full Time MBA Degree with first class from a Reputed Institute

content_sections.heading: NIT Calicut Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIT Calicut Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIT Calicut Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Calicut Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Research Associate: Master of Planning with specialization in Urban Planning/Regional Planning/Housing/Environmental Planning/Transport Planning or Equivalent. Desirable: PhD in relevant area. Proficiency in Soft Computing/GIS/MS Project/Data Analytics. Experience: 2 Years for Non-Ph.D. Administrative Officer: Full Time MBA Degree with first class from a Reputed Institute. Experience: 5 years experience in administrative duties in the private or public sector.

content_sections.heading: NIT Calicut Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Research Associate: Consolidated Salary Rs. 53,000/- per month Administrative Officer: Consolidated Salary Rs. 1,00,000/- per month

rows.event: Opening date of the online application portal
Closing date of the online application portal

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIT Calicut Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Calicut to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Calicut Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the NIT Calicut Recruitment 2026 is 13th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Research Associate and Administrative Officer posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies, with 2 for Research Associate and 1 for Administrative Officer.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: A Master of Planning with specialization in Urban Planning/Regional Planning/Housing/Environmental Planning/Transport Planning or Equivalent is required. A PhD in a relevant area is desirable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification for the Administrative Officer post?
faq.answer: A Full Time MBA Degree with first class from a Reputed Institute is required for the Administrative Officer position.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: The consolidated salary for the Research Associate post is Rs. 53,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for the Administrative Officer post?
faq.answer: The consolidated salary for the Administrative Officer post is Rs. 1,00,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC candidates is Rs. 1000.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application fee for SC/ST and Women candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for SC/ST and Women candidates is Rs. 500.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Skill Test and a Trade Test.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification PDF and the apply online link in the "Important Links" section of this article.
